name: Passive Critical Infrastructure Measurement
description: Passive measurement profile for KRITIS and NIS2 essential entities. More frequent than standard but strictly passive. Intended for continuous availability monitoring of critical infrastructure web presence.

sources.notes: Single-source passive only. Distributed probing requires explicit operator agreement.

legal.notes: Critical infrastructure monitoring. Strictly passive. Contact: noc@iof.example

colourThresholds.notes: Stricter than standard — 95% minimum for GRN per KRITIS/NIS2 requirements
